themes.label: Peace/Rest

Commentary leans on "And David built there an altar unto the LORD, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּשְׁלָמִ֑ים: and peace offerings - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".
